title: Houses for Rent in Willowick, OH
metaTitle: Houses for Rent in Willowick, OH (Lake County)
metaDescription: Looking for houses for rent in Willowick, Ohio? See Lake County location facts, Greater Cleveland rent data, and Section 8 notes, then tell us what you need.
answerBox: Willowick is a small Lake County city on the Lake Erie shoreline, northeast of Cleveland near Eastlake, Wickliffe, and Willoughby. Rent Finder Cleveland's rental portfolio is concentrated in Cleveland's east and northeast side neighborhoods, not Lake County, so tell us what you need and we'll point you to current options nearby.

sections.h2: Renting a house in Willowick, Ohio
body: Willowick is a small city in Lake County, Ohio, sitting on the Lake Erie shoreline in the same northeastern corridor as Eastlake, Wickliffe, and Willoughby, northeast of Cleveland along the lake. It's a lakefront community distinct from the Cuyahoga County suburbs closer to Cleveland proper, like Euclid and Cleveland Heights.

Rent Finder Cleveland manages rental homes concentrated in Cleveland's east and northeast side neighborhoods — we do not currently have listed inventory specifically in Willowick, or elsewhere in Cuyahoga County's suburbs. If a Willowick address is what you need, [tell our leasing team what you're looking for](/p/book-showing) and we'll let you know if anything nearby becomes available, or point you to comparable Section 8-friendly homes in Cleveland's closest lakefront neighborhoods.

sections.h2: What do rentals cost in the Greater Cleveland area right now?
body: We don't have Willowick-specific rent data, but regional figures give renters a useful benchmark. Per Zumper's rent research report dated July 4, 2026, the median asking rent across the Cleveland market is $1,250 a month, up 4.2% year-over-year. Per RentCafe's (Yardi) report dated July 2, 2026, the average rent across professionally managed Cleveland-area apartments is $1,564 a month for about 787 square feet — a higher figure because it weights larger, newer buildings rather than the full range of listings.

Both sources agree on the bigger picture: Greater Cleveland remains well below the national median. Zumper puts the national median at $1,950 a month, meaning the Cleveland area runs roughly 36% cheaper.

sections.h2: Section 8 and housing vouchers for Lake County renters
body: The Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority ([CMHA](https://www.cmha.net/housing/applicants/housing_choice_vouchers.php)) administers Housing Choice Vouchers (Section 8) for Cuyahoga County, which does not include Willowick — Willowick is in Lake County. If you hold a voucher and want to rent in Willowick, confirm with your caseworker which public housing authority has jurisdiction over Lake County addresses and whether porting your voucher there is an option.

It's also worth knowing that Ohio has no statewide source-of-income law requiring landlords to accept vouchers. As of our July 2026 research, only a handful of Cuyahoga County suburbs — Cleveland Heights, South Euclid, University Heights, Warrensville Heights, and Linndale — have local ordinances protecting voucher holders from that kind of denial. Nothing in our sources indicates a similar ordinance in Willowick or elsewhere in Lake County, so confirm current local rules before counting on a specific address.

Every home Rent Finder Cleveland manages accepts Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready — that's true across our entire portfolio, it's just that our portfolio sits in Cleveland proper rather than Lake County. Read more in our [Cleveland Section 8 guide](/section-8-housing-cleveland-oh/).

sections.h2: Closest Section 8-friendly rental homes to Willowick
body: The nearest concentration of homes we manage is in Collinwood, Cleveland's northeastern-most lakefront neighborhood in ZIP code 44110, which sits along the same Lake Erie shoreline corridor before it crosses into Lake County. Every home we manage there accepts Section 8 and is HUD-inspection-ready. [See what's available in Collinwood](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-collinwood-cleveland/) if you're open to a Cleveland address closer to the lake.

For renters set on staying in Lake County, our [Willoughby rental guide](/cleveland-rentals/suburbs/houses-for-rent-willoughby-ohio/) covers a neighboring Lake County community, though we currently manage no listed homes there either — it's included for reference, not availability.

sections.h2: How to check current availability near Willowick
body: Because our Willowick-area inventory changes and may be limited, the fastest way to find out what's real right now is to contact our local team directly rather than search a static listing count. [Tell us your bedroom count, budget, and whether you hold a housing voucher](/p/book-showing), and we'll tell you honestly what's available in or near Willowick, or in the closest neighborhoods we do serve. You can also browse our full [Cleveland rentals resource hub](/cleveland-rentals/) for other Lake County and Cuyahoga County suburb guides.

faq.q: Does Rent Finder Cleveland have houses for rent in Willowick, Ohio?
faq.a: Our managed portfolio is concentrated in Cleveland's east and northeast side neighborhoods, and we do not currently have listed inventory specifically in Willowick, which is in Lake County. Tell our team what you're looking for and we'll point you to the closest current options, including nearby Cleveland lakefront neighborhoods.

faq.q: What is the average rent for a house in the Cleveland area?
faq.a: Per Zumper's July 4, 2026 report, the Cleveland-area median asking rent is $1,250 a month. Per RentCafe's July 2, 2026 report, the average rent across professionally managed apartments is $1,564 a month. Neither figure is Willowick-specific, since we don't track that market directly.

faq.q: Does CMHA cover Section 8 vouchers in Willowick?
faq.a: No. CMHA is the Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority and administers vouchers for Cuyahoga County, not Lake County, where Willowick sits. Voucher holders should confirm which public housing authority has jurisdiction over Lake County and ask about porting a voucher there.

faq.q: Where can I find Section 8-friendly rental homes near Willowick?
faq.a: The closest homes we manage are in Collinwood (ZIP 44110), Cleveland's northeastern-most lakefront neighborhood. Every home in our portfolio accepts Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready, though our footprint is concentrated in Cleveland and does not currently extend into Willowick itself.

faq.q: Is there a source-of-income law protecting voucher holders near Willowick?
faq.a: Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept vouchers. Only a handful of Cuyahoga County suburbs currently have local protections, and none of our sources show a similar ordinance covering Willowick or other Lake County communities — confirm current local rules before relying on one.
